proposed_relations.description: Offset bus lanes on 125th Street from east of Lenox to 2nd Avenue proposed as part of the M60 SBS project, presented to CB9 on June 5, 2013

evidence_refs.source_quote: Offset Bus Lane Eastbound and Westbound
Bus lanes from east of Lenox to 2 nd Av

decisions.rationale: Evidence explicitly shows offset bus lanes on 125th Street as part of the M60 SBS proposal in the CB9 presentation. Corridor relation already exists; adding project-level relation supported by the same evidence.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Offset Bus Lane Eastbound and Westbound
Bus lanes from east of Lenox to 2 nd Av

proposed_relations.description: AM Commercial Loading zones (8 AM - 11 AM) in selected locations on 125th Street proposed as part of the M60 SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: AM Commercial Loading zones in selected locations

decisions.rationale: Evidence explicitly describes commercial loading zones as part of the Revised Street Design for the M60 SBS project on 125th Street. Corridor relation already exists; adding project-level relation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: AM Commercial Loading zones in selected locations

proposed_relations.description: Curb extensions at SW and NE corners of Amsterdam Avenue and West 125th Street to reduce crossing distances, proposed as a pedestrian safety improvement on the 125th Street corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the proposed curb extensions at the intersection of Amsterdam Av and W. 125th St
Curb extensions on SW and NE corners would reduce crossing distances

decisions.rationale: Evidence explicitly describes curb extensions at Amsterdam Avenue and West 125th Street, which is within the 125th Street corridor. The project relation already exists; adding the corridor-level relation since the treatment is on the 125th Street corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the proposed curb extensions at the intersection of Amsterdam Av and W. 125th St
Curb extensions on SW and NE corners would reduce crossing distances

proposed_relations.description: Proposed curb extensions and crosswalk at Morningside Avenue and 125th Street to make bus stop safer to access, part of the M60 SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed Curb Extensions at Morningside Av
Proposed crosswalk and additional pedestrian space make bus stop safer to access

decisions.rationale: Evidence explicitly presents curb extensions at Morningside Avenue as part of the M60 SBS proposal in the CB9 presentation. Morningside Avenue is west of the corridor's Amsterdam Avenue limit, so only the project relation is appropriate.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed Curb Extensions at Morningside Av
Proposed crosswalk and additional pedestrian space make bus stop safer to access

proposed_relations.description: Off-board fare payment as a feature of Select Bus Service on the M60 along the 125th Street corridor

decisions.rationale: Evidence explicitly lists off-board fare payment as a core SBS feature for the M60 on 125th Street. The project relation already exists; adding the corridor-level relation since off-board fare payment serves the 125th Street corridor.
